allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const { Pool } = require\('pg'\); const pool = new Pool\({ host: process.env.DB_HOST, port: process.env.DB_PORT, database: process.env.DB_NAME, user: process.env.DB_USER, password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD }\); pool.query\('SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 1'\).then\(r => { console.log\('DB OK:', r.rows.length, 'users'\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('DB ERROR:', e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const { Pool } = require\('pg'\); const pool = new Pool\({ host: process.env.DB_HOST, port: process.env.DB_PORT, database: process.env.DB_NAME, user: process.env.DB_USER, password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD }\); pool.query\(\\"SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'users' ORDER BY ordinal_position\\"\).then\(r => { console.log\('Users table columns:'\); r.rows.forEach\(c => console.log\('-', c.column_name, ':', c.data_type, c.is_nullable === 'NO' ? '\(required\)' : ''\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('ERROR:', e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")
